message.body: Echo_Mask is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: Christmas 2 (Secret Santa Games 2025) - Day 9
OtiWolf watched 25 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! nelde
Riechert watched 25 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! is so over

and that game is this but buffed
if you do the first save, we will give you a cookie
anyways, goob job oti on collecting 3 letters in cn3 otiwolPet

this looks like it would be the bummer game
this isnt jolly this is EVIL JOLLY

no you already played the chatran game
if I were to make L-needle, I'd just make a bunch of jumps, never test it and send it to the recepient otiwolTerror

the planes are nerfed in the last jump right?

the one with the speed vines

this is so cn3 (I'm cn3 pilled)
i can see this being a f31 hub room

I made my game so each stage is +1 screen longer

wolfi really popped off with this game

you go through the gate right away

there isn't even an avoidance tag for it
oh here you europeans go thinking you're the center of the world
i've seen two japanese clears and one chinese clear
im happy how it turned out though, i didn't procrastinate one day otherwise i would have been stressed out so hard
when i tried out the wheel the first game i rolled was my game

i love my gameplay! where is my gameplay...
I can almost hear the game...
they joined twice, this is their alt
I kinda have like 5 names because of the 5 OCs
holy shit shoot 2 ubersaw is cooking with this one

You have to time them yeah
quick get plasma to add 69 more games to the wheel

i could see a whole game work around this

this could work well with this gimmick
Thanks! I definitely want to make more osu needle
thanks for doing these streams btw
it was really fun to watch these
thank you for playing my game <3
thx for the streams and games
I'd love to see some osu
My skill's pretty bad myself heh
Game's mostly unfun for me. I haven't figured out pen grip yet
for whatever reason i can't get my tablet to work with osu, so i can only play with mouse
People in my lab are obsessed with osu. They do all sorts of crazy stuff. There's this one map of a favorite song I want to beat, but like jumps are impossible for me
I have yet to beat a 5 star
I'm going to try this map. Looks fun

im currently uploading the nerfed version of my game, but idk if you plan on playing more fangames today

alright, just posted it in showcase, but no rush ofc
i nerfed every single jump in the game to something that should be almost trivial
this is the bummer game right?
i was aiming for like 50 with the nerfs
it includes both versions of the game is why its so big

btw theres no screen border kills

only thing that bothers me is the spikes are barely visible + behind the water
im making a couple more nerfs and updating the same link
but that's just me and everything bothers me otiwolSploinky

should be up in a hour or so
yeah theres still stuff to explore underwater
applying the nerfs in real time
you helped give them their key back
the white crystal is a joke, its a simon's quest reference
also this was made in like 2 sittings so its not super developed, its pretty short
you should try and get into the tv area tho
I liked the concept of the game, can I steal
a lot of the secrets are there to nerf jumps or teach you secret routes through the map to make it easier
so you make "progress" despite always starting at the same save
which is more useful when the game is 90 diff
AND you can do the 5-jump to get back up if you fail the bonk jump, how cool is that?
wait did you make i by balls joke
idk what that is so no
the room after you open the door
if you think about how the screens connect i think you can find the tv entrance echo
that switch at the top of the map just opens up the end btw
also the music in the game is 40 minutes long, which is also why the game is so big lmao
you actually nearly had it but just barely didnt touch the right block
video is up in like 15 mins
might be hard to tell with the purple water
its a different small circle from fangames
is the buffed version only in the bundle
no thats all it is, it lets you skip the planes + floorgate, and access the statue so if you know the code you can skip the djump diamond as well
if you end up stopping before i upload it i'll post it in #clears regardless
i nerfed it even more at the same link, but yeah
getting the key in the og is pretty hard
the screen with the key has a double diamond as well :)
give me like less than 5 mins
Enjoying the stream? Join the discord to have a chat on days I am not streaming:   https://discord.gg/UsXjRQU
might have missed some stuff but oh well i was focusing on the clear
i just added the moments where i was clueless lol
i didn't know what the statue did
i remembered the 254 but i never had to input it
a secret with the most goofy needle
the dialogue here is unchanged yea
new dialogue wouldve needed a few more hours of work
if you play a lot of this kind of needle you'll have muscle memory for a lot of these jumps already, so its not too bad
thank god you didn't add a double plane
that would have been the end of me
idk what valign or setup makes double plane possible so i didnt want to add one and accidentally have it be impossible
i only added jumps i could do myself with some kind of consistency
thanks for the streams, they were very entertaining
